title: Set up TanStack Router v1 with Vite and React
summary: Install TanStack Router, configure the Vite plugin for file-based routing, create the root and index routes, add RouterProvider, and navigate with Link and useNavigate.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Router v1 â€” a fully type-safe React router with first-class file-based routing, route loaders, and search parameter validation. This is for Vite + React projects. If you are using Next.js (which has its own router), say so before I begin.
